case_title: CARLOS BAUTISTA VS. ELVIA ANDRADEDOS SANTOS

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF BAUTISTA, CARLOS AS TO DEFENDANT SANTOS, ELVIA ANDRADEDOS AS AN INDIVIDUAL DBA CAFE DO BRASIL MARKET STREET;  DBA CAFE DO BRAZIL MARKET STREET JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BAUTISTA, CARLOS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SANTOS, ELVIA ANDRADEDOS AS AN INDIVIDUAL DBA CAFE DO BRASIL MARKET STREET;  DBA CAFE DO BRAZIL MARKET STREET $6,446.14 PRINCIPAL, $67.61 INTEREST, $153.30 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,667.05, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
